description: Entry-level and mainstream MCU models from GigaDevice (excluding high-performance series)

GD32E23x.notes: ARMv8-M architecture with TrustZone security extension

GD32E232.notes: Analog-optimized MCU with 4x 12-bit DAC, CLA (Configurable Logic Array)

GD32E1x3.notes: Hardware FPU, high temperature grade available (up to 105°C)
